title: bromus microtrichus
intro: Bromus microtrichus, also known as Small Cuckoo Brome, is a type of grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bromus microtrichus include treating skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Bromus microtrichus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion and can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
